retrospective_historical_replay_964.description: Out-of-sample historical replay evaluation across 22 FIFA World Cup tournaments (1930-2022)
retrospective_historical_replay_964.note: Historical 964-match replay benchmark under strict A v4 quarantined core model.

prospective_2026_online.description: Prospective online live service predictions for 2026 matches
prospective_2026_online.note: These metrics represent online service performance up to the current cutoff and must not be mixed with historical replay benchmarks.

governance_separation_rule: Brier 0.5059 and ECE 0.1563 belong strictly to the 43 prospective 2026 online sample; Brier 0.5702 belongs strictly to the 964-match historical replay. The two must never be mixed or conflated.
